name: portfolio-k6-booker
description: Performance Testing Framework for the Restful-Booker API

scripts.test:smoke: k6 run -e TIPO=smoke test.js && open reporte_booker.html
scripts.test:load: k6 run -e TIPO=average test.js && open reporte_booker.html
scripts.test:stress: k6 run -e TIPO=stress test.js && open reporte_booker.html
scripts.test:spike: k6 run -e TIPO=spike test.js && open reporte_booker.html
scripts.test:soak: k6 run -e TIPO=soak test.js && open reporte_booker.html
scripts.test:breakpoint: k6 run -e TIPO=breakpoint test.js && open reporte_booker.html

author: Juan Gozzi
